data.title: Artificial Intelligence in Africa: Prospects, Challenges and Opportunities Based on Social Media Discourse
data.authors: Grace Ataguba, Oladapo Oyebode, Bilikis Banire, Fidelia Orji, Gerry Chan, Sandra Meier, George Frempong, Rita Orji
data.description: Recent advancements in Artificial Intelligence (AI) are fundamentally reshaping Africa's socio-technological landscape, with United Nations Development Programme projections indicating a potential $1.5 trillion economic impact. Despite this potential and proliferating AI initiatives across the continent, a significant gap exists in understanding the public perception of AI's implementation, societal impact, and inherent challenges within African contexts. This study presents a human-centered analysis of 129 unique posts spanning 2,326 sentences of Reddit public discussions pertaining to AI in Africa. Using a mixed-methods approach integrating machine learning-based sentiment analysis with systematic thematic analysis, we investigate how AI technologies in Africa are perceived and conceptualized by the public within online communities. Our findings elucidate complex narratives surrounding AI adoption, revealing …
